children.text: Assessments collected under .section 518d of this title
Such amounts as are necessary from the Commodity Credit Corporation.
Any interest earned on investment of amounts in the Tobacco Trust Fund under subsection (c).

children.label: A
children.text: to make payments under sections 518a and 518b of this title;

children.label: B
children.text: to provide reimbursement under ;section 519(c) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: to reimburse the Commodity Credit Corporation for costs incurred by the Commodity Credit Corporation under paragraph (2); and

children.label: D
children.text: to make payments to financial institutions to satisfy contractual obligations under section 518a or 518b of this title.

children.heading: Expenditures by Commodity Credit Corporation
children.label: 2 Expenditures by Commodity Credit Corporation
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary shall use the funds, facilities, and authorities of the Commodity Credit Corporation to make payments described in paragraph (1). Not later than , the Secretary shall use amounts in the Tobacco Trust Fund to fully reimburse, with interest, the Commodity Credit Corporation for all funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation expended under the authority of this paragraph. Administrative costs incurred by the Secretary or the Commodity Credit Corporation to carry out this title may not be paid using amounts in the Tobacco Trust Fund.January 1, 20151See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Commodity Credit Corporation shall invest such portion of the amounts in the Tobacco Trust Fund as are not, in the judgment of the Commodity Credit Corporation, required to meet current expenditures.

children.heading: Interest-bearing obligations
children.label: 2 Interest-bearing obligations
children.text: Investments may be made only in interest-bearing obligations of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: on original issue at the issue price; or

children.label: B
children.text: by purchase of outstanding obligations at the market price.

children.heading: Sale of obligations
children.label: 4 Sale of obligations
children.text: Any obligation acquired by the Tobacco Trust Fund may be sold by the Commodity Credit Corporation at the market price.

children.heading: Credits to Fund
children.label: 5 Credits to Fund
children.text: The interest on, and the proceeds from the sale or redemption of, any obligations held in the Tobacco Trust Fund shall be credited to and form a part of the Fund.
